CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2018 Off Calendar

Status Hearing Re: Petitioner Seeking Approval Of The Special Needs Trust In The Probate Division.
Off Calendar Feb-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sandra Isabelle C. Tan, Esq. of the Dolan Law Firm, T:415.421.2800, for plaintiff;
No other appearance.

RULING: Plaintiff's counsel represented that the Court's assistance is not necessary and that all remaining issues in this case shall be brought before the Probate Division. Therefore,

STATUS HEARING RE: PETITIONER SEEKING APPROVAL OF THE SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST IN THE PROBATE DIVISION is Off Calendar.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-13-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Status Hearing Re: Petitioner Seeking Approval Of The Special Needs Trust In The Probate Division.
Off Calendar Jan-18-2018 Continued To Feb-07-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sandra Isabelle C. Tan, Esq. of the Dolan Law Firm, T:415.421.2800, for petitioner;
No other appearance.

RULING: Counsel for petitioner informs the court that the hearing in this matter is scheduled on Feb. 6, 2018 in the probate department and requests a continuance of this motion. The request is granted. The Court vacates the tentative ruling and continues the STATUS HEARING RE: PETITIONER SEEKING APPROVAL OF THE SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST IN THE PROBATE DIVISION to February 7, 2018 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.
